summaryShort: Solder bridges on QFP components at SMT line 2 (EQ Beta) causing increased scrap rate since this morning.
summaryLong: The caller reported **solder bridges on QFP components** at **SMT line 2 (SMC2)** during the **EQ Beta** process. The defect has been occurring since this morning and has led to a significantly increased scrap rate. The worker has already **checked and readjusted the solder paste and reflow oven parameters** as a corrective measure.

line.source: An der SMC2 beim EQ Beta

keywords.source: Lötbrücken an den QFP-Bauteilen ... Ausschussrate ist deutlich gestiegen ... Lötpaste und die Reaktorparameter schon geprüft und nachjustiert
